Additional details.Note: No published spec sheet on surveyed Indian collateral at time of review

description_text: My Home Plus appears in Indian oxygen-concentrator comparison listings but does not carry a publicly documented technical specification sheet on the collateral we have surveyed. Key specifications — flow range, purity, weight, sound level, power draw, alarm coverage, certifications — are not verifiable. Listed here for cross-reference only; not recommended for a prescribed LTOT purchase without a published spec sheet from the manufacturer.
